rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 12, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT SANDEEP HINGORANI, PIPER DAVIES, URSULA HINGORANI MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT This action is stayed until the earliest of (1) time to seek judicial review of the Rent Board's decision expires; or (2) any request for judicial review is resolved. Either party may move to lift the stay when (1) or (2) occurs. The Court does not rule on other arguments raised by demurrer at this time. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 12, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT SANDEEP HINGORANI, URSULA HINGORANI, PIPER DAVIES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained as follows: this action is stayed until the earliest of (1) time to seek judicial review of the Rent Board's decision expires; or (2) any request for judicial review is resovled. Either party may move to lift the stay when (1) or (2) occurs. The Court does not rule on other arguments raised by demurrer at this time. =(501/REQ)
